mapper.select: select u.user_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, u.email, u.phonenumber from sys_user u inner join sys_project p on p.create_by = u.user_name where p.project_id = #{projectId} and u.del_flag = '0'

select (select count(*) from sys_defect where project_id = #{projectId}) as defectCount, (select count(*) from sys_case where project_id = #{projectId}) as caseCount, (select count(*) from sys_user_project where project_id = #{projectId}) as memberCount, (select count(*) from sys_module where project_id = #{projectId}) as deliverableCount
